Areas Served
Why High School Shine

Detailing backed by real chemistry, not guesswork.

This isn't a wipe-and-go operation. Every product, every method, and every vehicle is researched before we ever touch your car.

01

Chemistry-First Approach

Every product is chosen for pH balance, surface compatibility, and how it interacts with your specific paint and interior materials — not just because it's what's on the shelf.

02

Researched Before We Arrive

We look into your vehicle's make, model, and known trouble spots ahead of time, so we know exactly what it needs before we ever park in your driveway.

03

A Profile For Every Car

We're building a growing database on every vehicle we detail — tracking what works, what to avoid, and how it ages — so each future visit gets even more precise.

Services & Pricing

Two packages. Zero guesswork.

Pricing varies by vehicle size. Every detail is done by hand, on-site, using premium products — and Deluxe builds on everything in Refresh.

Refresh Detail

For regular maintenance & weekly drivers
Sedan$120
SUV / Crossover$140
Truck / Minivan / Large SUV$160
  • Foam pre-wash (when appropriate)
  • Hand wash with pH-neutral shampoo
  • Wheel face & tire cleaning + dressing
  • Door jambs cleaned
  • Spray ceramic protection (P&S Bead Maker)
  • Streak-free exterior glass
  • Light interior vacuum & wipe-down
  • Interior windows cleaned
  • Optional new car scent
Best forVehicles detailed every 1–3 months
Time1.5–2.5 hrs
Book Refresh Detail

Deluxe Detail

For a deep, transformative clean
Sedan$199
SUV / Crossover$239
Truck / Minivan / Large SUV$279

Everything in Refresh Detail, plus:

  • CarPro Lift pre-wash foam + decontamination
  • Deep wheel, tire & wheel well cleaning
  • Bug & light tar removal
  • Contact hand wash + premium drying
  • Griot's 3-in-1 Ceramic Wax
  • Trim dressing & restoration
  • Deep vacuum + compressed air blowout
  • UV interior protectant on all plastics
  • Leather cleaned & conditioned
  • Floor mats & interior glass cleaned
  • Light pet hair / stain removal
Best forPre-sale, seasonal, or first-time deep clean
Time2.5–4 hrs
Book Deluxe Detail
Add-On

Heavy Pet Hair Removal — homes with pets often need more than a standard vacuum. Add deep pet hair extraction for $35 with Refresh Detail, or +$25 with Deluxe Detail (which already includes light pet hair removal).

For Our Regulars

Shine All The Time

A membership for owners who want their car to always look its best — without thinking about booking it. One monthly detail, a reserved spot on the calendar, and real perks that add up.

Sedan$99/mo
SUV / Crossover$115/mo
Truck / Large SUV / Minivan$129/mo

That's roughly 18–20% off standard Refresh Detail pricing — plus 15% off every add-on, every single month.

Join Shine All The Time
  • One Refresh Detail monthlyIncluded in your membership, every month
  • Reserved monthly time slotA standing appointment — never competing for openings
  • 15% off all add-onsPet hair removal, headlight restoration, ceramic upgrades & more
  • Locked-in pricingYour rate never increases, even as standard pricing does
  • Priority responseMember messages answered within hours, not days
  • Annual loyalty upgradeOne free Deluxe Detail upgrade after 12 consecutive months
  • Referral perkRefer a friend who joins — get a free month
  • Welcome giftA black & gold High School Shine gift bag after your first detail — logo magnet, branded air freshener, premium microfiber towel, and referral cards

About Us

Premium detailing, built on the basics done right.

High School Shine is a mobile detailing business based in West Linn, Oregon. We started with one simple idea: every car deserves a real, hands-on detail — not a rushed drive-through wash — without the customer having to go anywhere.

Your Name

Your founder bio goes here.

Fully MobileWe bring our own equipment, water, and power to your location.
Professional-Grade ProductsP&S, CarPro, and Griot's Garage — trusted by detailers nationwide.
